prs.title: Merge main into staging
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Merge PR aggregating two hotfixes (scoped marketplace uniqueness constraint + Bedrock toolConfig fix) plus a full AWS Marketplace URL intake feature with UI, server actions, schema migration, and E2E/unit tests across 17 custom files — substantial breadth even though some lines originate from constituent PRs.

prs.title: feat: add product from AWS Marketplace URL + edit company name
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Adds AWS Marketplace URL-based product creation and an edit-company-name flow, touching server actions, UI components, a new AWS listing-details library, and E2E tests across 10 files with 667 custom lines.

prs.title: fix(studio): Bedrock toolConfig on competitive-analysis finalize (prod hotfix)
prs.author: Chad
prs.rationale: Targeted hotfix correcting Bedrock toolConfig shape for competitive-analysis finalize step, with a unit test to cover the regression — modest but non-trivial AI agent fix.

prs.title: fix(readiness): scope Product.marketplaceListingId unique per company (prod hotfix)
prs.author: Chad
prs.rationale: Scopes the marketplace listing ID uniqueness constraint to per-company via a Prisma schema change, migration SQL, collector update, and unit test — small but complete data-model fix.

prs.title: fix(automation): enforce tenant isolation on automation actions
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Enforces tenant isolation across automation control, tools, and assistant/automation server actions with supporting unit tests — meaningful security/correctness fix touching core AI automation plumbing.

prs.title: fix(studio): enqueue BTS generation directly from assessment + strategy slides
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Small targeted fix wiring BTS generation enqueue calls into two slide/node components — minimal logic, 25 lines across 2 files.

prs.title: Revert #475 (guided-experience UI / action-needed tray) out of staging
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Reverting a sizeable guided-experience UI feature (17 files, 386 custom lines re-added as the revert state) requires careful reconstruction of prior state and is more effort than a trivial undo.

prs.title: Terraform IaC foundation for AWS Cognito migration
prs.author: Chad
prs.rationale: Establishes a full Terraform IaC foundation for AWS Cognito migration including bootstrap, per-environment configs, Dockerized runner, GitHub Actions CI workflows, CODEOWNERS, and documentation across 44 files — architectural infrastructure work.

prs.title: Sm 565/guided experience UI
prs.author: Mauro
prs.rationale: Builds a complete guided-experience UI with tray, task cards, inline prompts, CRM connect panel, assignee selectors, sandbox state pages, and AppShell integration across 17 files and ~1400 custom lines.

prs.title: Studio: move BTS & Competitive Analysis generation to background workers
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Migrates BTS and Competitive Analysis generation to BullMQ background workers, adding new Prisma schema/migration, enqueue utilities, updated studio UI with polling, reworked agent tools, and slide-deck integration across 26 files and ~1890 custom lines — major architectural shift.

prs.title: fix(docker): ship docs/ into runner image so admin docs load
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Single-line Dockerfile tweak to copy docs/ into the runner image — trivial config fix.

prs.title: fix(docker): ship docs/ into runner image so admin docs load
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Duplicate of PR #471 — same single Dockerfile change, trivial.

prs.title: Playbook editing + AI assistant guided flow
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Introduces playbook editing UI, AI assistant guided flow, outcome/task/automation schema additions, migration, new automation agent tools, guided-flow event tracking, and admin playbook hierarchy editor across 35 files and ~1735 custom lines — major feature spanning multiple platform layers.

stories.name: AWS Marketplace Product Integration & Company Management
stories.rationale: Enabled users to add products directly from AWS Marketplace URLs and fixed a data integrity issue ensuring marketplace listing IDs are unique per company.

stories.name: Background AI Generation for Studio (BTS & Competitive Analysis)
stories.rationale: Moved BTS and Competitive Analysis generation to background workers for a non-blocking Studio experience, fixed a Bedrock toolConfig bug in competitive analysis, and enabled direct enqueuing from assessment and strategy slides.

stories.name: Guided Experience UI Rollout & Rollback
stories.rationale: Introduced the guided experience UI with an action-needed tray, then reverted it from staging due to issues, reflecting an in-progress feature stabilization cycle.

stories.name: Tenant Isolation & Security Hardening for Automation
stories.rationale: Enforced strict tenant isolation on automation actions to prevent cross-tenant data leakage and ensure platform security.

stories.name: AWS Cognito Authentication Migration Foundation
stories.rationale: Established the Terraform infrastructure-as-code foundation required to migrate user authentication to AWS Cognito.

stories.name: Playbook Editing with AI Assistant Guided Flow
stories.rationale: Delivered a full playbook editing experience enhanced with an AI assistant guided flow to help users build and refine business playbooks.

stories.name: Admin Documentation Fix in Runner Image
stories.rationale: Fixed the Docker runner image to correctly include the docs directory so that admin documentation loads properly in deployed environments.

stories.name: Staging Environment Sync & Release Promotion
stories.rationale: Merged main branch changes into staging to synchronize environments and prepare the latest production-ready changes for validation.
